results.pred_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_users FROM identity.users

SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM catalog.products 
WHERE status = 'active' AND deleted_at IS NULL
SELECT code FROM geo.currencies

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT order_id) AS refunded_orders_count
FROM sales.returns
WHERE refunded_at IS NOT NULL

SELECT AVG(grand_total) AS average_grand_total
FROM sales.orders

SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM support.tickets 
WHERE priority = 'urgent'

SELECT SUM(amount) AS total_captured_amount
FROM billing.payments
WHERE captured_at IS NOT NULL

SELECT COUNT(*) AS archived_product_count
FROM catalog.products
WHERE deleted_at IS NOT NULL

SELECT COUNT(*) AS active_subscriptions_count
FROM billing.subscriptions
WHERE status = 'active'

SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM geo.countries 
WHERE continent = 'Europe'

SELECT AVG(employee_count) AS average_employee_count
FROM crm.accounts

SELECT COUNT(*) AS open_tickets_count
FROM support.tickets
WHERE status IN ('new', 'open', 'pending')

SELECT COUNT(*) AS overdue_invoices_count
FROM billing.invoices
WHERE due_at < NOW() AND status != 'paid'

SELECT p.name AS product_name, b.name AS brand_name
FROM catalog.products p
LEFT JOIN catalog.brands b ON p.brand_id = b.id

SELECT pr.id AS review_id, pr.title AS review_title, p.name AS product_name
FROM catalog.product_reviews pr
JOIN catalog.products p ON pr.product_id = p.id

SELECT s.id AS subscription_id, p.name AS plan_name
FROM billing.subscriptions s
JOIN billing.plans p ON s.plan_id = p.id

SELECT p.id, p.name
FROM catalog.products p
LEFT JOIN catalog.product_reviews pr ON p.id = pr.product_id
WHERE pr.id IS NULL

SELECT currency_code, SUM(grand_total) AS total_revenue
FROM sales.orders
GROUP BY currency_code

SELECT p.id, p.name
FROM catalog.products p
JOIN catalog.product_reviews pr ON p.id = pr.product_id
GROUP BY p.id, p.name
HAVING AVG(pr.rating) > 4

SELECT p.id, p.name, SUM(oi.quantity) AS total_units_sold
FROM sales.order_items oi
JOIN catalog.product_variants pv ON oi.product_variant_id = pv.id
JOIN catalog.products p ON pv.product_id = p.id
GROUP BY p.id, p.name
ORDER BY total_units_sold DESC
LIMIT 5

SELECT p.code AS plan_code, COUNT(s.id) AS active_subscriptions_count
FROM billing.subscriptions s
JOIN billing.plans p ON s.plan_id = p.id
WHERE s.status = 'active'
GROUP BY p.code

SELECT 
    DATE_TRUNC('month', placed_at) AS month, 
    COUNT(*) AS order_count
FROM 
    sales.orders
WHERE 
    placed_at >= (CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '12 months')
GROUP BY 
    month
ORDER BY 
    month

SELECT AVG(resolved_at - created_at) AS average_resolution_days
FROM support.tickets
WHERE resolved_at IS NOT NULL

SELECT COUNT(*) AS order_count
FROM sales.orders o
JOIN identity.users u ON o.user_id = u.id
WHERE o.tenant_id = u.tenant_id

SELECT c.id AS category_id, COUNT(pc.product_id) AS product_count
FROM catalog.product_categories pc
JOIN catalog.categories c ON pc.category_id = c.id
GROUP BY c.id
ORDER BY product_count DESC
LIMIT 3

SELECT SUM(grand_total) AS total_revenue_eur
FROM sales.orders
WHERE currency_code = 'EUR'

SELECT 
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE cancelled_at IS NOT NULL) * 1.0 / COUNT(*) AS cancelled_fraction
FROM 
    sales.orders

SELECT id, tenant_id, name, legal_name, domain, industry, employee_count, annual_revenue, currency_code, owner_user_id, phone, website, is_active, created_at, updated_at, deleted_at
FROM crm.accounts
WHERE employee_count > 100

SELECT 
    p.name AS plan_name,
    AVG(i.total) AS average_order_value
FROM 
    billing.subscriptions s
JOIN 
    billing.plans p ON s.plan_id = p.id
JOIN 
    billing.invoices i ON s.id = i.subscription_id
GROUP BY 
    p.name

SELECT status, COUNT(*) AS paid_invoices_count
FROM billing.invoices
WHERE paid_at IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY status

SELECT COUNT(*) AS bounced_sessions_count
FROM analytics.web_sessions
WHERE is_bounce = true

SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM pricing.coupons 
WHERE status = 'active'

SELECT SUM(amount) AS total_successful_refunds
FROM billing.payment_refunds
WHERE status = 'successful'
results.error: invalid input value for enum refund_status: "successful"

SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM audit.audit_log 
WHERE action = 'delete'

SELECT AVG(score) AS average_csat_score
FROM support.csat_responses

SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM crm.opportunities 
WHERE is_won = true

SELECT COUNT(*) AS churned_subscriptions_count
FROM billing.subscriptions
WHERE ended_at IS NOT NULL

SELECT COUNT(*) AS marketing_blasts_sent
FROM marketing.campaign_messages
WHERE sent_at IS NOT NULL

SELECT COUNT(*) AS goods_out_movements_count
FROM inventory.stock_movements
WHERE kind = 'goods-out'
results.error: invalid input value for enum movement_kind: "goods-out"

results.pred_sql:
SELECT COUNT(*) AS converted_leads_count
FROM crm.leads
WHERE converted_account_id IS NOT NULL

SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM comms.webhook_deliveries 
WHERE status = 'failed'

SELECT status, COUNT(*) AS notification_count
FROM comms.notifications
GROUP BY status

SELECT action, COUNT(*) AS entry_count
FROM audit.audit_log
GROUP BY action

SELECT DATE_TRUNC('month', occurred_at) AS month, COUNT(*) AS event_count
FROM analytics.events
GROUP BY month
ORDER BY month

SELECT status, COUNT(*) AS failed_count
FROM ops.job_runs
WHERE status = 'failed'
GROUP BY status

SELECT 
    COUNT(bounced_at) * 1.0 / COUNT(*) AS bounce_fraction
FROM 
    marketing.campaign_messages

SELECT currency_code, SUM(total) AS total_invoiced_amount
FROM billing.invoices
GROUP BY currency_code

SELECT tenant_id, COUNT(*) AS open_opportunities_count
FROM crm.opportunities
WHERE is_closed = false
GROUP BY tenant_id

SELECT 
    n.id AS notification_id,
    ce.email AS user_email
FROM 
    comms.notifications n
JOIN 
    identity.users u ON n.user_id = u.id
JOIN 
    crm.contact_emails ce ON u.id = ce.contact_id
WHERE 
    ce.is_primary = true

SELECT 
    o.id AS opportunity_id,
    o.name AS opportunity_name,
    p.name AS pipeline_name
FROM 
    crm.opportunities o
JOIN 
    crm.pipelines p ON o.pipeline_id = p.id

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT pr.id) AS refund_count
FROM billing.payment_refunds pr
JOIN billing.payments p ON pr.payment_id = p.id
WHERE p.captured_at IS NOT NULL

SELECT *
FROM pricing.coupons
WHERE times_redeemed = 0

SELECT 
    c.code AS coupon_code,
    SUM(od.amount) AS total_redeemed_discount
FROM 
    sales.order_discounts od
JOIN 
    pricing.coupons c ON od.coupon_id = c.id
GROUP BY 
    c.code

SELECT 
    rated_agent_id AS agent_id, 
    AVG(score) AS average_score
FROM 
    support.csat_responses
GROUP BY 
    rated_agent_id
HAVING 
    AVG(score) < 3

SELECT c.name AS campaign_name, COUNT(cm.id) AS message_count
FROM marketing.campaign_messages cm
JOIN marketing.campaigns c ON cm.campaign_id = c.id
GROUP BY c.name
HAVING COUNT(cm.id) > 100

SELECT 
    p.id AS pipeline_id, 
    p.name AS pipeline_name, 
    COUNT(o.id) AS won_opportunities_count
FROM 
    crm.pipelines p
JOIN 
    crm.opportunities o ON p.id = o.pipeline_id
WHERE 
    o.is_won = true
GROUP BY 
    p.id, p.name
ORDER BY 
    won_opportunities_count DESC

SELECT
    DATE_TRUNC('month', occurred_at) AS month,
    SUM(CASE WHEN direction = 'debit' THEN amount ELSE 0 END) OVER (ORDER BY DATE_TRUNC('month', occurred_at)) AS running_total
FROM
    billing.ledger_entries
GROUP BY
    DATE_TRUNC('month', occurred_at)
ORDER BY
    month
results.error: column "ledger_entries.direction" must appear in the GROUP BY clause or be used in an aggregate function

results.pred_sql:
SELECT event_name, COUNT(*) AS event_count
FROM analytics.events
GROUP BY event_name
ORDER BY event_count DESC
LIMIT 5

SELECT sa.display_name, AVG(cr.score) AS average_csat_score
FROM support.csat_responses cr
JOIN support.support_agents sa ON cr.rated_agent_id = sa.id
GROUP BY sa.display_name

SELECT sl.name AS warehouse_name, COUNT(sm.id) AS stock_movements_count
FROM inventory.stock_movements sm
JOIN inventory.stock_locations sl ON sm.stock_location_id = sl.id
JOIN inventory.warehouses w ON sl.warehouse_id = w.id
GROUP BY sl.name

SELECT DISTINCT cm.recipient_email
FROM marketing.campaign_messages cm
LEFT JOIN sales.orders o ON cm.user_id = o.user_id
WHERE cm.opened_at IS NOT NULL
AND o.id IS NULL

SELECT COUNT(*)
FROM comms.notifications n
JOIN identity.users u ON n.user_id = u.id
WHERE n.tenant_id = u.tenant_id

SELECT COUNT(*) AS abandoned_baskets_count
FROM sales.carts
WHERE status = 'abandoned'

SELECT COUNT(*) AS delivered_fulfillments_count
FROM sales.fulfillments
WHERE delivered_at IS NOT NULL

SELECT COUNT(*) AS active_product_variants_count
FROM catalog.product_variants
WHERE is_active = true

SELECT COUNT(*) AS fully_received_po_count
FROM inventory.purchase_orders po
JOIN inventory.purchase_order_lines pol ON po.id = pol.purchase_order_id
WHERE po.status = 'received' AND pol.quantity_ordered = pol.quantity_received

SELECT COUNT(*) AS rejected_sign_in_attempts
FROM identity.login_attempts
WHERE succeeded = FALSE

SELECT COUNT(*) AS failed_transactional_emails
FROM comms.email_log
WHERE status = 'failed'

SELECT AVG(duration_seconds) AS average_page_view_duration
FROM analytics.page_views

SELECT gateway, SUM(amount) AS total_captured_amount
FROM billing.payments
WHERE captured_at IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY gateway

SELECT status, COUNT(*) AS order_count
FROM sales.orders
GROUP BY status

SELECT EXTRACT(HOUR FROM occurred_at) AS hour, COUNT(*) AS event_count
FROM analytics.events
GROUP BY hour
ORDER BY event_count DESC
LIMIT 1

SELECT 
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'sent')::decimal / COUNT(*) AS success_fraction
FROM 
    comms.email_log
results.error: invalid input value for enum delivery_status: "sent"

results.pred_sql:
SELECT ticket_id, COUNT(*) AS message_count
FROM support.ticket_messages
GROUP BY ticket_id
HAVING COUNT(*) >= 8

SELECT order_id, SUM(line_total) AS total_line_value
FROM sales.order_items
GROUP BY order_id
ORDER BY total_line_value DESC
LIMIT 10

SELECT 
    s.tracking_number, 
    o.order_number
FROM 
    sales.shipments s
JOIN 
    sales.fulfillments f ON s.fulfillment_id = f.id
JOIN 
    sales.orders o ON f.order_id = o.id
WHERE 
    s.delivered_at IS NOT NULL

SELECT 
    c.id AS contact_id,
    c.first_name,
    c.last_name,
    a.name AS account_name
FROM 
    crm.contacts c
LEFT JOIN 
    crm.accounts a ON c.account_id = a.id

SELECT pm.kind, COUNT(p.id) AS captured_payments_count
FROM billing.payments p
JOIN billing.payment_methods pm ON p.payment_method_id = pm.id
WHERE p.status = 'captured'
GROUP BY pm.kind

SELECT b.name AS brand_name, SUM(oi.quantity) AS total_quantity_sold
FROM sales.order_items oi
JOIN catalog.product_variants pv ON oi.product_variant_id = pv.id
JOIN catalog.products p ON pv.product_id = p.id
JOIN catalog.brands b ON p.brand_id = b.id
GROUP BY b.name

SELECT 
    w.name AS warehouse_name, 
    COUNT(f.id) AS fulfillment_count
FROM 
    sales.fulfillments f
JOIN 
    inventory.warehouses w ON f.warehouse_id = w.id
WHERE 
    f.status IN ('shipped', 'delivered')
GROUP BY 
    w.name
ORDER BY 
    fulfillment_count DESC
LIMIT 5

SELECT 
    currency_code, 
    SUM(amount) AS total_succeeded_refund_amount
FROM 
    billing.payment_refunds
WHERE 
    status = 'succeeded'
GROUP BY 
    currency_code

SELECT 
    user_id, 
    placed_at, 
    grand_total, 
    SUM(grand_total) OVER (PARTITION BY user_id ORDER BY placed_at) AS running_total
FROM 
    sales.orders
ORDER BY 
    user_id, 
    placed_at
LIMIT 50

WITH monthly_order_counts AS (
    SELECT 
        DATE_TRUNC('month', placed_at) AS month,
        COUNT(*) AS order_count
    FROM 
        sales.orders
    WHERE 
        placed_at IS NOT NULL
    GROUP BY 
        DATE_TRUNC('month', placed_at)
),
monthly_order_changes AS (
    SELECT 
        month,
        order_count,
        LAG(order_count) OVER (ORDER BY month) AS previous_month_order_count
    FROM 
        monthly_order_counts
)
SELECT 
    month,
    order_count,
    (order_count - previous_month_order_count) AS change_from_previous_month
FROM 
    monthly_order_changes

SELECT owner_user_id, COUNT(*) AS won_deals_count
FROM crm.opportunities
WHERE is_won = true
GROUP BY owner_user_id
ORDER BY won_deals_count DESC
LIMIT 5

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT u.id) AS users_without_successful_signin
FROM identity.users u
LEFT JOIN identity.login_attempts la ON u.id = la.user_id AND la.succeeded = true
WHERE la.id IS NULL

SELECT p.id, p.name, COUNT(pr.id) AS approved_review_count
FROM catalog.products p
JOIN catalog.product_reviews pr ON p.id = pr.product_id
WHERE pr.is_approved = true
GROUP BY p.id, p.name
ORDER BY approved_review_count DESC
LIMIT 10
